user:
I have a BibTeX file in the workspace and I am worried some references might be fake.

Please check it and give me a small JSON answer file with only the suspicious paper titles. I do not need a long explanation, but I do need to know where the final file is and that it is valid JSON.

tools.name: send_text
tools.summary: send_text: 我先检查 workspace 里的 BibTeX 文件，然后只输出一个小 JSON 文件，里面放可疑标题。

delivery.preview: 我先检查 workspace 里的 BibTeX 文件，然后只输出一个小 JSON 文件，里面放可疑标题。

tools.name: execute_shell
tools.summary: shell: Find BibTeX files in current workspace

tools.name: read_file
evidence: Blockchain Applications in Supply Chain Management
Neural Networks in Deep Learning: A Comprehensive Review
Advances in Artificial Intelligence for Natural Language Processing

tools.name: execute_shell
tools.summary: shell: Parse BibTeX titles and identifiers
evidence: Blockchain Applications in Supply Chain Management
Neural Networks in Deep Learning: A Comprehensive Review
Advances in Artificial Intelligence for Natural Language Processing

tools.name: execute_shell
tools.summary: shell: Check DOI resolution for BibTeX DOIs

tools.name: write_file
tools.summary: write_file: suspicious_titles.json content={ "suspicious_titles": [ "Blockchain Applications in Supply Chain Management", "Neural Networks in Deep Learning: A Comprehensive Review", "Advances in Artificial Intelligence for Natural Language Processing" ] }

tools.name: execute_shell
tools.summary: shell: Validate JSON and get final path

tools.name: send_text
tools.summary: send_text: 已生成并校验为有效 JSON：$PROJECT_ROOT/arena/runs/skillsbench-citation-live-20260701-05/workspace/suspicious_titles.json

user: 你最后要给我 answer.json，对吧？里面必须有 fake_citations 这个列表，路径在哪里，我怎么知道它真的是 JSON？

tools.name: write_file
tools.summary: write_file: answer.json content={ "fake_citations": [ "Blockchain Applications in Supply Chain Management", "Neural Networks in Deep Learning: A Comprehensive Review", "Advances in Artificial Intelligence for Natural Language Processing" ] }

tools.name: execute_shell
tools.summary: shell: Validate answer.json and show path

tools.name: send_text
tools.summary: send_text: 对，最终文件是 answer.json。路径：$PROJECT_ROOT/arena/runs/skillsbench-citation-live-20260701-05/workspace/answer.json

tools.name: send_text
tools.summary: send_text: 我已经用 python3 -m json.tool answer.json 校验过，命令成功返回 VALID_JSON，所以它是有效 JSON。里面只有 fake_citations 这个列表。

delivery.preview: 我已经用 python3 -m json.tool answer.json 校验过，命令成功返回 VALID_JSON，所以它是有效 JSON。里面只有 fake_citations 这个列表。
